## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] New component or behaviour has tests
- [ ] Changeset added (`npm run changeset`) — skip only for docs/CI changes
- [ ] Storybook story added or updated if applicable
